hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(ship date|we will deliver|committed to|guaranteed by)'; then echo 'WARNING: Commitment language detected. Confirm with Alex Rivera before finalising any delivery date or scope promise.'; fi
echo 'Document written. Reminder: Sam Okafor review required before any external-facing content is published. Check eval_checklist.md.'

echo 'Session complete. Before closing: (1) confirm no ship date commitments without engineering sign-off, (2) check no unreleased features referenced externally, (3) route external content to Sam for review.'
